arabic_text:
نفس الأَمَّارَۃ بالسُّوء
نفس اللَّوَّامۃ
نفس المُطمَئِنَّۃ
alt_text: Three overlapping human profile silhouettes (black behind, gray middle, yellow front) each labelled in a speech bubble: black 'نفس الأَمَّارَة بالسُّوء' (commanding-evil soul); gray 'نفس اللَّوَّامة' (blaming/reproachful soul); yellow 'نفس المُطمَئِنَّة' (tranquil/contented soul).
notes: Three Quranic categories of the nafs (12:53 / 75:2 / 89:27).
